rows.label: qev041102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Good grief... That Roma guy is way
too persistent-mo... I bet he's
absolutely unpopular with girls-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Mogya!? Who... are you-mo? Are you
perhaps that guy's underling-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask the reason why Bodaboda
is unusually frightened.

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say you came to deliver the
cargo upon Zazazan's request.

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmph! Bodaboda is not
frightened or anything-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Go away-mo. Bodaboda doesn't
really like Earthlings-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ooh! You are that Earthling-mo! I
received contact from Zazazan-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0011
qev041102_MSG0012
rows.name:
You... haven't looked at the
contents of the cargo, right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you haven't looked.

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what is inside the cargo.

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0013
rows.name:
That doesn't answer the question-mo. I'll
ask one more time-mo. You... haven't looked
at the contents of the cargo, right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0071
rows.name: Say you haven't looked.

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0080
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask once again what is inside the cargo.

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0014
rows.name:
...What are you suspecting-mo?
Bodaboda doesn't want to talk
with someone like you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Call out to me once you feel
like talking properly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Good... Bodaboda loves obedient
guys-mo. Now, hurry up and
hand over the cargo-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0018
rows.name:
Mhm, good work-mo. With this,
Bodaboda and the others will
make a huge profit-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0019
rows.name:
Now, take your reward-mo. I've
prepared something perfect for
an honest person like you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0020
rows.name:
Have you finally felt like
talking honestly-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'll ask one more time-mo.
You... haven't looked at the
contents of the cargo, right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0091
rows.name: Say you haven't looked.

rows.label: qev041102_JNK0100
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041102_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask once again what is inside the cargo.

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0022
rows.name:
...You are persistent-mo.
Bodaboda doesn't want to talk
with someone like you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0023
rows.name:
Call out to me once you feel
like talking properly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0024
rows.name:
Good... Bodaboda loves obedient
guys-mo. Now, hurry up and
hand over the cargo-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0026
rows.name:
Mhm, good work-mo. With this,
Bodaboda and the others will
make a huge profit-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041102_MSG0027
rows.name:
Now, take your reward-mo. I've
prepared something perfect for
an honest person like you-mo.[ST:wait ]
